summary: Mission v14.8 Testing Complete - Calendar +7 day offset fix VERIFIED. Bug fixed: 'if (daysUntilCourse <= 0)' changed to 'if (daysUntilCourse < 0)' in ChatWidget.js (line 1806) and BookingPanel.js (line 22). Frontend shows correct date 04.03 (today) instead of 11.03 (+7 days bug). 10/11 backend tests passed.

minor.issue: Returns 0 reservations (data state, not a bug)

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Date format fr-CH with timeZone Europe/Zurich verified in both files
✅ Frontend shows 'mer., 04.03. • 18:30' for Wednesday course on March 4 (TODAY)
✅ Same-day booking now works correctly (daysUntilCourse=0 does NOT trigger +7 days)
✅ Logic verified: Wednesday (day 3) + course Wednesday (weekday 3) = 0 days = 04.03.2026
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mission v14.8 calendar date fix verified. The bug was in the condition 'if (daysUntilCourse <= 0)' which has been fixed to 'if (daysUntilCourse < 0)' to allow same-day booking. Both ChatWidget.js (line 1806) and BookingPanel.js (line 22) have the fix. Frontend correctly shows 'mer., 04.03.' for Wednesday March 4 course. Date format is fr-CH with Europe/Zurich timezone. Anti-regression: 8 contacts (PASS), 0 reservations (data state).

bug_rca.description: Calendar was showing March 11 instead of March 4 (today)
bug_rca.root_cause: The condition 'if (daysUntilCourse <= 0)' included 0 (same-day) as needing +7 days
bug_rca.fix_applied: Changed to 'if (daysUntilCourse < 0)' so same-day (0) doesn't add 7 days
bug_rca.verification: Frontend shows 'mer., 04.03. • 18:30' for Wednesday course on Wednesday March 4
